summary: 47th run on perplexity. APF S1+S2 engine block confirmed via URL slug rewrite to 'blocked-4a700d20-43b2-499a-8d48-3acb60e9d59e' and corresponding /rest/thread/blocked-... fetch. However, no warning bubble rendered: SPA bounced back to homepage instead of rendering the blocked thread page. No real LLM PII analysis was streamed. Mission protection HELD. Classic S3 UI gap (ENGINE_FIXED_PENDING_UI_VERIFY) — engine works, frontend does not surface the warning to the user.

wire_level.ownership_field_observed: not_captured_at_xhr_level (would require HAR export to confirm; URL-level evidence only)

console_state.errors_count: 6 errors visible in DevTools (badge: 'Open Console to view 6 errors')
notable_errors: restricted-feature-loader-BEHy3DHC.js (cloudflareaccess login redirect — pre-existing, not block-related)

dom_scan.post_submit_main_view: homepage_default (search input + suggestion buttons + Computer 사용해 보기) — same UI as before submit; no answer tab, no thread layout

key_findings.ui_status: S3 UI rendering FAILS — SPA bounces to homepage instead of rendering blocked-thread response with Korean warning bubble
key_findings.regression_vs_baseline: consistent with prior runs — 47th iteration shows same ENGINE_FIXED_PENDING_UI_VERIFY signature
key_findings.ownership_field_capture: URL/network panel evidence captured; raw XHR body of /rest/thread/blocked-... not exported (HAR file not generated); follow-up should capture HAR explicitly to inspect ownership/permission JSON field
key_findings.private_thread_modal: NOT observed in this run (previous runs reported it; this run went straight to homepage bounce)

recommendation.next_action: Frontend team must ensure SPA router treats slug pattern 'blocked-*' as a renderable thread route (currently routes to homepage). Add a dedicated 'blocked thread' template that renders the Korean warning bubble using the ownership/permission field from /rest/thread/blocked-* response.
recommendation.phase_advance: Hold at Phase 6 (warning impl) — do NOT advance until S3 UI bubble verified in two consecutive runs.
recommendation.har_capture_priority: HIGH — next test PC run should explicitly export HAR for /rest/thread/blocked-* response body to confirm ownership field value and decide whether engine is sending the warning payload but UI ignores it, or engine is omitting the payload.
